steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Subtract $20$: $8x=56$, then divide by $8$: $x=7$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Applying the distributive property on the left-hand side of the given equation yields $3x+5x+20=76$, or $8x+20=76$. Subtracting $20$ from each side of this equation yields $8x=56$. Dividing each side of this equation by $8$ yields $x=7$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the solution to the equation $x+4=76$, not $3x+5\left(x+4\right)=76$.
